zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Boleyn於1475年11月28日出生在英國諾福爾可雪登時，她的父親Sir William Boleyn24歲，母親Lady Margaret Butler21歲。她於1497年與John Shelton,在英國諾福爾可布利可林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年1月6日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布拉可代爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Boleyn于1475年11月28日出生在英国諾福爾可雪登时，她的父亲Sir William Boleyn24岁，母亲Lady Margaret Butler21岁。她于1497年与John Shelton,在英国諾福爾可布利可林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年1月6日在英国英格兰諾福爾可布拉可代爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Boleyn was born on 28 November 1475, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir William Boleyn, was 24 and her mother, Lady Margaret Butler, was 21. She married John Shelton, in 1497, in Blickling, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 January 1556, in Bracondale, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Boleyn est née le 28 novembre 1475, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Boleyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Butler, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Shelton, en 1497, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1556, à Bracondale, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Boleyn am 28. November 1475 in Shelton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Boleyn 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Butler 21. Sie hat 1497 in Blickling, Norfolk, England John Shelton, geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1556 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Bracondale, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Boleyn è nata il il 28 novembre 1475 nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Boleyn, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Butler, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Shelton, nel 1497, nel Blickling, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1556, nel Bracondale, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Boleynが1475年11月28日にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Boleynは24歳，母Lady Margaret Butlerは21歳であった。1497年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングでJohn Shelton,と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年1月6日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブラコンダルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Boleyn(이)가 1475년 11월 28일 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Boleyn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Butler(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 John Shelton,(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 브라콘데일에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.28 November 1475–6 January 1556: 28 de novembro de 1475–6 de janeiro de 1556
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Boleyn nasceu em 28 de novembro de 1475, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Boleyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Butler, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shelton, em 1497, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1556, em Bracondale, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Boleyn родилась 28 ноября 1475 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Boleyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Butler, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shelton, в 1497 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 января 1556 г. в местности бракондеил, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.28 November 1475–6 January 1556: 28 de noviembre de 1475–6 de enero de 1556
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Boleyn nació el 28 de noviembre de 1475, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Boleyn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Butler, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Shelton, en 1497, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1556, en Bracondale, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
